summary: Frontend-only E2E validation of the new Médiathèque (admin media library) + MediaPicker integration in AdminProducts. All requested flows work end-to-end. Login (admin@stmpagri.ci) OK. Sidebar shows 'Médiathèque' linking to /admin/medias. Page /admin/medias renders with all declared testids: admin-media-page, admin-media-upload-btn, admin-media-upload-section (Select), admin-media-search, and admin-media-tab-{all,header,content,footer} with count badges. Multi-file upload via admin-media-file-input to section='header' (2 valid PNGs) → counts moved from 0/0/0/0 to all:2 header:2 content:0 footer:0, grid rendered 2 admin-media-item-* cards with correct HEADER badge. Tab filter verified: header=2, content=0, footer=0 (and 'all'=2). Preview modal opens on click of admin-media-preview-btn-{id}, contains admin-media-preview-{copy,open,edit}. Edit flow (admin-media-edit-{id} → admin-media-edit-dialog → fields section/title/alt/tags → admin-media-edit-save) persists changes. Search 'TEST_updated_title' correctly filters grid down to 1 item. MediaPicker in /admin/produits: opening 'Ajouter' → dialog → clicking admin-products-field-image-library-btn opens admin-products-field-image-picker with the 4 tabs, search, upload, cancel and confirm (confirm disabled initially, enabled after item selection). Selecting a header image and clicking confirm injected the URL '/api/files/stmp-agri/media/<uuid>.png' into admin-products-field-image-url-input as expected. Delete-with-usage: created a product referencing the picked image via API, then opened admin-media-delete-{id} on that media → admin-media-delete-warning shown with correct text (‘Cette image est utilisée à 1 endroit : 1 produit …’) and Supprimer button remains active (choix 2.b). Delete-without-usage: opening delete dialog on the unused image showed NO warning; admin-media-delete-confirm succeeded and grid/counters updated. All test data cleaned up at the end (0 media, 0 TEST_ products remaining). No pageerrors, no console errors related to the feature.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminMedia.jsx line ~123-131 (copyUrl): the local const 'full' is computed then discarded (void full). Simplify to only compute and copy resolveImageUrl(m.url).
AdminMedia.jsx: the filtered variable is just a re-assign of data (line 85) — dead alias; can be removed or replaced by using data directly.

MediaPickerDialog.jsx and AdminMedia.jsx both use the same react-query key ['media', section, q]; a search typed in the picker will overwrite the AdminMedia page's cached list (and vice-versa) leading to unnecessary refetches when both are mounted. Consider namespacing the picker's queryKey (e.g. ['media-picker', section, q]).
AdminMedia handleUpload uploads files sequentially in a for-loop; for 5+ files this feels slow. Consider Promise.all with a concurrency cap.

CrudManager ImageField hard-codes defaultSection='content' for the picker — for header/footer contexts (partners, logos), callers cannot override. Consider adding a per-field prop mediaSection to the field config (used by CrudManager).

AlertDialogDescription in AdminMedia wraps a
using `asChild` to embed the warning box: shadcn's AlertDialogDescription renders a

. Wrapping a

inside a

via asChild works because asChild forwards props to the child, but this can generate a11y warnings; consider moving the warning outside the description.
Backend was not retested per instructions (already 19/19 media library tests + 88/88 global tests reported OK).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 12 declared flows verified (sidebar, page, upload, tab filter, search, preview, edit, copy URL, delete with usage warning, delete without warning, MediaPicker in products, URL injection)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test PNGs (TEST_green.png, TEST_red.png) uploaded to section=header and 1 TEST_UITEST_product referencing one of them to validate the usage warning. ALL cleaned up at end (verified 0 remaining media + 0 remaining TEST_ products).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Médiathèque frontend is production-ready. Key testids (confirmed present + working): admin-media-page, admin-media-upload-{btn,section}, admin-media-file-input, admin-media-tab-{all,header,content,footer} (with count badges), admin-media-search, admin-media-grid, admin-media-item-{id}, admin-media-preview-btn-{id}, admin-media-copy-{id}, admin-media-edit-{id}, admin-media-delete-{id}, admin-media-preview-dialog + admin-media-preview-{copy,open,edit}, admin-media-edit-dialog + admin-media-edit-{section,title,alt,tags,save,cancel}, admin-media-delete-dialog + admin-media-delete-{warning,confirm,cancel}. MediaPicker (used from CrudManager's ImageField AND from CoverImageField): opened via '<field-prefix>-library-btn' → dialog testid '<prefix>-picker' with '-tab-{all,header,content,footer}', '-search', '-upload-btn', '-file-input', '-grid', '-empty', '-item-{id}', '-confirm' (disabled without selection), '-cancel'. Example (products): admin-products-field-image-library-btn / admin-products-field-image-picker-*. Media upload uses POST /api/admin/media with multipart 'file' + query 'section' + 'title'. Selected media URL injected as relative '/api/files/stmp-agri/media/<uuid>.<ext>'. Usage endpoint GET /api/admin/media/{id} returns .usages = {total, products, articles, realisations, partners, pages}.
